Under a tree...

Okay, so, hi guys!! Remember me? Well yes, I'm back, after a year long hiatus. Obviously, this is a Valentine's Day bot, so I've just been editing this to perfection, and I hope you enjoy my official return to this site!!

... he's aged up by the way. Just in case weirdos are tryna interact with this.
